uk.updateNote: Updated information on European Entry-Exit System (EES) (‘Entry requirements’ page).

ie.updateNote: In recent months, Slovenia has experienced heavy rainfalls and storms that have resulted in severe and dangerous flooding over large parts of the country. Levels of risk remain high due to the possibility of sudden heavy rain and the movement of ground that has been damaged and made unstable including following recent floods.
